title: DND1_RNA_MD_simulations_part4
author: Cojocaru, Vlad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The MD simulations of the M_2 replica (R2,R3) simulations for systems:  DND1-RNA, RRM1-RNA , RRM2-RNA . There are 2 independent simulations (m_2_cmd02, m_2_cmd03  in .netcdf format) started from the same M_2 structure. 
 
 
 To load the files in a visualisation program you first have to load the AMBER topology .prmtop file and then each trajectory file separetly. 
 
 
 Example for VMD 
 
 
 vmd -parm7 .prmtop -netcdf .netcdf
